questions.text: What is the name of the parent organization of SLATEFALL?
questions.explanation: The parent organization of SLATEFALL is the Pan-American Metahuman Cooperative (PAMC), as stated in the provided text.

questions.text: What is the metahuman classification of Lt. Solène Bauer-Cortez?
questions.explanation: Lt. Solène Bauer-Cortez has a metahuman classification of Class C-1 (Electromagnetic Sensing), which allows her to perceive EM emissions from 30 Hz to 6 GHz within 80 m.

questions.text: What is the name of the Director-General of the Pan-American Metahuman Cooperative (PAMC)?
questions.explanation: The Director-General of the Pan-American Metahuman Cooperative (PAMC) is María-Elena Espósito-Tagle, who is serving a term from 2022 to 2027.

questions.text: What is the role of Cpl. Raúl Vendrame in Cell Halcón?
questions.explanation: Cpl. Raúl Vendrame is the Field Medic of Cell Halcón, providing medical support during operations.

questions.text: How many registered operatives are there in the Pan-American Metahuman Cooperative (PAMC) as of 1 January 2026?
questions.explanation: There are 217 registered operatives in the Pan-American Metahuman Cooperative (PAMC) as of 1 January 2026.

questions.text: What is the primary function of the Edificio Marasol base in Lima?

choices.A: Field office for Bolivian altiplano operations
choices.B: PAMC Headquarters where the asset rotates through quarterly for senior briefings

questions.explanation: The Edificio Marasol base in Lima serves as the PAMC Headquarters where the asset attends senior briefings on a quarterly basis.

questions.text: What is the status of the S-4 safehouse in Antofagasta, Antofagasta?
questions.explanation: The S-4 safehouse in Antofagasta was damaged but has been rebuilt and is currently active.

questions.text: What is the purpose of the micro-cache network maintained by the asset?

choices.B: To provide supply caches for operations
choices.C: To serve as communication relay points

questions.explanation: The micro-cache network is designed to provide the asset with supply caches containing essential items such as food, medical supplies, and communication equipment.

questions.text: What is the reason for the restriction on the Cerro Castillo exclusion ring?
questions.explanation: The Cerro Castillo exclusion ring is restricted due to psychological reasons, as recommended by the CBMP since 2020, following an incident in 2018.

questions.text: What is the nature of the agreement between the asset and the Bolivian Servicio de Operaciones Especiales (SOE)?

choices.A: Adversarial; the asset operates to counter SOE activities
choices.B: Bilateral cooperation framework for La Paz operations
choices.C: Competitive; the asset and SOE have overlapping objectives
choices.D: Hierarchical; the asset is subordinate to SOE in Bolivian operations

questions.explanation: The asset has a bilateral cooperation framework with the Bolivian Servicio de Operaciones Especiales (SOE), facilitating collaborative efforts in La Paz operations.

questions.text: What is the format for recording case files in PAMC?

choices.B: Case number (year-sequence), Date (start–end), Location (city, province, country), Classification (open / classified / declassified), Outcome
choices.C: Location (city, province, country), Date (start–end), Case number (year-sequence)
choices.D: Outcome, PAMC casualties, Adversary casualties, Post-action notes

questions.explanation: The PAMC format includes case number, date, location, classification, outcome, and other details as specified in section 9.1.

questions.text: What was the outcome of Case 2024-0202: Quebrantadero Showdown?
questions.explanation: The outcome of Case 2024-0202 was Catastrophic, with 11 civilian deaths and 27 civilian injuries.

questions.text: In which case was the Drift Read ability first operationally validated?
questions.explanation: The Drift Read ability was first operationally validated in Case 2021-0091: Atacama Altiplano.

questions.text: What was the result of Case 2025-0019: Audiencia Counter-Audit?
questions.explanation: The outcome of Case 2025-0019 was Successful, with the audit reversed.

questions.text: What was the location of Case 2022-0123: Tropopausa First Engagement?
questions.explanation: The location of Case 2022-0123 was the Mendoza Free Trade Zone, Argentina.

questions.text: What is the core principle of the Doctrine of Sequential Suspension regarding suspension as a resource?

choices.B: Suspension is a decisive resource, not a continuous capability
choices.C: Suspension is only used in emergency situations
choices.D: Suspension is not a relevant factor in combat

questions.explanation: The Doctrine of Sequential Suspension states that suspension is a decisive resource, not a continuous capability, and should be treated as ammunition.

questions.text: What is the Three-Two-One Rule in the asset's signature tactical heuristic?

choices.A: Three activations minimum per 60-second window, one active sightline, and no extraction route
choices.B: Three activations maximum per 60-second window, two active sightlines, and one pre-anchored extraction route
choices.C: Two activations maximum per 60-second window, one active sightline, and no extraction route
choices.D: One activation maximum per 60-second window, three active sightlines, and no extraction route

questions.explanation: The Three-Two-One Rule states that the asset should have three activations maximum per 60-second window, maintain two active sightlines at any moment, and hold one pre-anchored extraction route in reserve.

questions.text: What is the purpose of the Tail-Strike Technique?

choices.A: To deliver a linear projectile motion
choices.B: To exploit Tail Momentum and deliver compounded impacts
choices.D: To suspend multiple objects in mid-air

questions.explanation: The Tail-Strike Technique exploits Tail Momentum to deliver compounded impacts that cannot be achieved by linear projectile motion alone.

questions.text: What is the standard activation pattern around the contact-exclusion rule?
questions.explanation: The Drop-Tune Manoeuvre is the standard activation pattern around the contact-exclusion rule, which permits a meaningful one-second window between release and engagement target acquisition.

questions.text: What is the civilian collateral threshold specified by PAMC Standing Order 9?

choices.A: 50% confidence that no civilian harm will occur
choices.B: 80% confidence that no civilian harm will occur
choices.C: 90% confidence that no civilian harm will occur
choices.D: 100% confidence that no civilian harm will occur

questions.explanation: PAMC Standing Order 9 specifies a zero-tolerance threshold below 80% confidence that no civilian harm will occur from any planned activation.

questions.text: What is the total floor area of Cuartel Valparaíso, the asset's primary operational base?
questions.explanation: The total floor area of Cuartel Valparaíso is given as 4,820 m² in the document.

questions.text: What is the name of the city where the asset has a field office for Bolivian altiplano operations?
questions.explanation: The field office for Bolivian altiplano operations is located in La Paz, as stated in the document.

questions.text: How many micro-caches are maintained by the asset across the Andean cordillera?
questions.explanation: The asset maintains a network of 19 micro-caches distributed across the Andean cordillera, as stated in the document.

questions.text: What is the approximate area of the asset's authorized operational territory?
questions.explanation: The asset's authorized operational territory spans approximately 6.8 million km², as stated in the document.

questions.text: How many burst-relay nodes are there within the PAMC Yatiri network serving the asset's operational territory?
questions.explanation: There are 8 burst-relay nodes within the PAMC Yatiri network serving the asset's operational territory, as stated in the document.
